identity.titleArabic:

summary.actualTranslationArabic:
A variable controlling whether the Steam button LED should be turned
on when a Steam
summary.actualMeaningArabic: يمثل هذا الماكرو ماكرو SDL HINT JOYSTICK HIDAPI STEAM HOME LED، أي توسعاً نصياً أو قيمة توليدية تؤثر في الكود قبل الترجمة.
summary.carriedValueArabic: الماكرو يوسع إلى #define SDL_HINT_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_STEAM_HOME_LED "SDL_JOYSTICK_HIDAPI_STEAM_HOME_LED" أو إلى تعبير مشتق منه، والقيمة الحقيقية هنا هي المعنى الذي يضيفه هذا التوسع إلى الكود.
summary.sourceDescription:
A variable controlling whether the Steam button LED should be turned
on when a Steam controller is opened.

remarks: The variable can be set to the following values:
"0": Steam button LED is turned off.
"1": Steam button LED is turned on.

By default the Steam button LED state is not changed. This hint can
also be set to a floating point value between 0.0 and 1.0 which controls
the brightness of the Steam button LED.
This hint can be set anytime.
